title: Warley's Story
description: Mod in which you take on the role of a paranoid man, afraid of every rustle
body:
**Mod in which you take on the role of a paranoid man, afraid of every rustle**
## Coming into the world
You appear in the normal world. Don't you?

## Dipterophobia
You're not afraid of flies, are you? Now you're going to start

## Death
Each of your deaths is just a bad dream, however, the way you wake up... Is your mental state getting worse and worse?

## Briefly about the mod
By installing this mod you will start getting screammers on the screen, as well as acquire claustrophobia, dipterophobia and aquaphobia
